display_text: Phantom Assassin Aghanim's Scepter: Fan of Knives — This upgrade counters high-health, tanky heroes by dealing percentage-based damage and applying Break, effectively neutralizing passive defensive abilities like Armor or Regeneration.
search_text: Phantom Assassin Aghanim Scepter Fan of Knives anti-tank Break percentage damage high-health heroes

display_text: Phantom Assassin Aghanim's Shard: Advances ability cooldowns on hero kills, enabling her to snowball more effectively in team fights. This counters prolonged engagements by allowing quicker access to critical abilities like Blur and Phantom Strike.
search_text: Phantom Assassin Aghanim Shard cooldown reduction snowball team fight quicker abilities Blur Phantom Strike
